steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student is surprised by differences in unit sales. The answer must show the biggest gap between two systems — the most striking disparity in the table.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Game & Watch sold approximately 18,600,000 units, whereas the ColecoVision sold only approximately 2,000,000 units.": a roughly 9× gap — by far the largest disparity in the table. ✓
  • "Game & Watch sold approximately 4,000,000 units, whereas the ColecoVision sold only approximately 3,000,000 units.": compares systems with a much smaller gap (~4M vs. ~3M) — not particularly surprising. ✗
  • "MSX sold approximately 4,000,000 units, whereas the Intellivision sold only approximately 3,000,000 units.": also a small gap (~4M vs. ~3M) — not a standout difference. ✗
  • "MSX sold approximately 18,600,000 units, whereas the Intellivision sold only approximately 2,000,000 units.": mismatches the table values for MSX and Intellivision. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
